title: boronia crenulata var. angustifolia
intro: Boronia crenulata var. angustifolia is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Boronia crenulata plant, which is a flowering plant native to Australia, belonging to the citrus family Rutaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Boronia crenulata var. angustifolia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
